news.t: Matthews Asia Launches First Active ETF Strategies to Meet Growing Client Need

holdings.infoBox: MCH is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tencent Holdings stock at 12.34%, Alibaba Group Holding at 6.07%, Jiangsu Zhongtian Technology at 4.06%, Kingboard Holdings at 3.95%, and China International Capital Corporation at 3.08%.

overview.description: The Matthews China Active ETF (MCH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to hold stocks of Chinese companies that are fundamentally screened for sustainable growth. The fund also considers ESG factors in the investment process. MCH was launched on Jul 13, 2022 and is issued by Matthews.

holdings.n: Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd.

data.title: Matthews Asia Launches First Active ETF Strategies to Meet Growing Client Need
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Matthews Asia launched three active exchange traded funds (ETFs) on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) today that focus on global emerging markets, Asia and China. The ...
